title: Account page — weight unit preference selector
description: Add the weight unit selector to the Account page so users can switch between lbs and kg.
acceptanceCriteria: Weight Unit section shows the current unit (lbs or kg) as the selected option
User can select the other unit from a dropdown/select component
Saving calls PATCH /api/user/preferences and updates the unit in AuthContext
After saving, the weight entry form shows the new unit label
After saving, the weight table shows entries with the new unit label
Save button shows loading state during API call

steps.details: Use shadcn/ui Select component with two SelectItem options: value='lbs' 'Pounds (lbs)' and value='kg' 'Kilograms (kg)'. Default selected to user.weight_unit from useAuth(). Track selected value in local state. Add a Save button.

onClick Save: call updatePreferences(selectedUnit) from apiService. On success: call updateUser() in AuthContext with the updated user object (which has the new weight_unit). Show 'Preferences saved' confirmation.
Switch from lbs to kg, click Save. Navigate to /dashboard — verify the weight entry form shows 'kg' label. Verify the table shows 'kg' next to weights. Switch back to lbs and verify it reverts.

technicalNotes: The unit change is cosmetic on the frontend — all weight values are stored as-entered, not converted
After updateUser() is called in AuthContext, all components reading user.weight_unit will re-render with the new unit
